ubuntu: if [ "$(id -u)" -eq 0 ]; then apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl; else sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y curl; fi
arch: if [ "$(id -u)" -eq 0 ]; then pacman -S --needed --noconfirm curl; else sudo pacman -S --needed --noconfirm curl; fi

ubuntu: if [ "$(id -u)" -eq 0 ]; then apt-get update && apt-get install -y nodejs npm; else sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y nodejs npm; fi
arch: if [ "$(id -u)" -eq 0 ]; then pacman -S --needed --noconfirm nodejs npm; else sudo pacman -S --needed --noconfirm nodejs npm; fi

windows: scoop update nodejs-lts; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { scoop install nodejs-lts }
macos: brew upgrade node || brew install node
ubuntu: if [ "$(id -u)" -eq 0 ]; then apt-get install -y nodejs npm; else sudo apt-get install -y nodejs npm; fi
arch: if [ "$(id -u)" -eq 0 ]; then pacman -S --needed --noconfirm nodejs npm; else sudo pacman -S --needed --noconfirm nodejs npm; fi

windows: scoop update oh-my-pi; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { scoop install oh-my-pi }
macos: brew upgrade can1357/tap/omp || brew install can1357/tap/omp

windows: scoop update rtk; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { scoop install rtk }
macos: brew upgrade rtk || brew install rtk

windows: scoop update uv; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { scoop install uv }
macos: brew upgrade uv || brew install uv

windows: uv tool upgrade graphifyy; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { uv tool install --upgrade graphifyy }
default: uv tool upgrade graphifyy || uv tool install --upgrade graphifyy
